title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 10 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 10 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 10 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/10/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 2.21% today, the main contract closed 739.5.More transactions in the market.PBF at Shandong port dealt 763-768 yuan/mt, increase 3-13yuan/mt;PBF at Tangshan port dealt 775 yuan/mt ;increase 5 yuan/mt. According to SMM statistics, the global iron ore shipments this week totaled 30.47 million tons, down 4.6% month on month. Among them, 13.27 million tons were sent from Australia to China, a decrease of 17% month on month; Brazil sent 3.42 million tons to China, down 8.3% month on month.
